metadata.title: EXAMPLE — Local vs Cloud AI, by the dollar (synthetic demo script)
metadata.description: A synthetic, public example of the aligned-script schema the render engine consumes. The numbers here are illustrative placeholders, NOT measured results — swap in your own aligned script (with real data from /data) to render a real episode. Each block's spoken_text is the digit-free first voiceover line that the alignment step matches against Whisper word-timings.

timeline.spoken_text: Here is the number that starts the whole argument.

visual_data.label: managed API · one always-on agent
visual_data.context: illustrative placeholder — bring your own measured figure

timeline.spoken_text: The whole test is small enough to read in one breath.

visual_data.code:
for host in (local, cloud):
    t = time.perf_counter()
    out = run(model, prompts)        # same model, both sides
    tok_s = out.tokens / (time.perf_counter() - t)
    report(host, tok_s, out.latency_ms, cost(host, out.tokens))

timeline.spoken_text: On raw speed, it is not even close.
But speed was never the bill.
Cheap and fast is worthless if the answers are wrong.
So match the tool to the job, and own what you run all day.

visual_data.label: the verdict
visual_data.context: full data + code in this repo — reproduce it yourself
